creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
The new wine-devel port, which relates to wine, needs a
	-devel version of wine-gecko as well, that is
	    wine goes with wine-gecko
	and
	    wine-devel goes with $NEWPORT

	I am just unsure, would that be wine-gecko-devel or
	wine-devel-gecko that needs to be repocopied from wine-gecko?

	(I have a new port from the maintainer of wine-gecko
	already, it just needs a decision on name and he repocopy.)
